# User Stories

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED from `stories.yaml`. Do not edit by hand. -->
<!-- Re-run `make generate` after editing the source YAML. -->

```{story} Keep the back-yard lawn freshly cut
:id: US_MOW_LAWN
:status: accepted
:tags: mowing;weekly
:area: back_yard

As a **homeowner** I want my back-yard lawn mowed weekly during the
growing season so that the lawn stays healthy and looks tidy when
visitors arrive.

![Garden layout](../../../pictures/public/garden_layout.svg)
```

```{story} Trim the front-yard edges before guests arrive
:id: US_FRONT_LAWN_TRIM
:status: accepted
:tags: mowing;party_prep
:area: front_yard

As a **homeowner** I want the lawn edges along the driveway and walkway
trimmed before any planned event so that the front of the house looks
well kept from the street.
```

```{story} Plant tomatoes and herbs in the vegetable bed
:id: US_PLANT_VEGGIES
:status: in_progress
:tags: planting;spring
:area: vegetable_bed

As a **hobby gardener** I want to plant tomatoes, basil and parsley in
the south-facing vegetable bed in May so that I can harvest fresh
produce throughout the summer.
```

```{story} Refresh the flower bed with seasonal flowers
:id: US_PLANT_FLOWERS
:status: open
:tags: planting;party_prep
:area: flower_bed

As a **homeowner** I want the front flower bed replanted with bright
seasonal flowers two weeks before the garden party so that the
arrangement is in full bloom by the time guests arrive.
```

```{story} Host a small garden party on the patio
:id: US_HOST_PARTY
:status: open
:tags: party_prep
:area: patio

As a **host** I want to set up tables, lighting and a barbecue area on
the patio so that 10–15 guests can comfortably enjoy a Saturday
afternoon garden party.
```
